device_name: HERA Z20, R20, HERA Z30, R30 Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-operativ
intended_use_full: The diagnostic ultrasound system and probes are designed to obtain ultrasound images and analyze body fluids. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Intra-operative, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric, Thoracic, Trans-esophageal (Cardiac) and Peripheral vessel.
target_condition: Fetal abnormalities, cardiac defects, obstetric measurements, uterine pathology
ground_truth: Manual annotations by expert clinicians (obstetricians with >20 years experience, sonographers/examiners with >10 years experience in relevant specialties; consensus process used for disputed annotations)
other_metrics: Live ViewAssist: Cohen's kappa coefficient 0.818 (threshold 0.7), speed 30.06 FPS (threshold 20 FPS); EzVolume: acceptance rates 80-98% (threshold 70%), mean DSC 0.66-0.96; UterineContour: dice-score uterus 96%, endometrium 92%, 3D coronal view appropriateness >90%; ViewAssist: recognition accuracy 94.50% (threshold 89%), anatomy annotation dice-score 0.892 (threshold 0.8); HeartAssist: recognition accuracy 95.00% (threshold 89%), segmentation dice-score 0.876 (threshold 0.8), measurement error rates (area ≤8%, angle ≤4%, circumference ≤11%, diameter ≤11%); BiometryAssist: segmentation dice-score 0.928 (threshold 0.8), measurement error rates (circumference ≤8%, distance ≤4%, NT/NB/IT ≤1mm)
